## Security and Data Safety

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, kubeconfigs, private keys, raw customer evidence, or generated `.local/incidents/` output are included.
- [ ] Examples use redacted values or documentation IP ranges.
- [ ] Runtime changes preserve read-only defaults unless explicitly documented and reviewed.
